---
title: "01_load_clean_data"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 0. Helper function
#--------------------------------------------------

fix_missing <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      across(
        where(is.character),
        ~ .x %>%
          na_if("'--") %>%
          na_if("--") %>%
          na_if("")
      )
    )
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load raw data
#--------------------------------------------------

sample_sheet_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "gdc_sample_sheet.2026-04-07.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

clinical_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "clinical.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

followup_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "follow_up.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

pathology_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "pathology_detail.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

exposure_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "exposure.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

family_raw <- read_tsv(
  here("data", "raw", "family_history.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

expr_raw <- read_csv(
  here("data", "raw", "gene_count_matrix_1pass_TCGA.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Clean names + fix missing values
#--------------------------------------------------

sample_sheet <- sample_sheet_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

clinical <- clinical_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

followup <- followup_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

pathology <- pathology_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

exposure <- exposure_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

family <- family_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  fix_missing()

expr <- expr_raw 
```

```{r}
glimpse(clinical)
summary(clinical$demographic_age_at_index)
table(clinical$demographic_vital_status, useNA = "ifany")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Build sample manifest
#--------------------------------------------------

sample_manifest <- sample_sheet %>%
  transmute(
    file_id,
    file_name,
    data_category,
    data_type,
    project_id,
    case_submitter_id = case_id,
    sample_submitter_id = sample_id,
    tissue_type,
    tumor_descriptor,
    specimen_type,
    preservation_method
  ) %>%
  distinct()

# quick flags
sample_manifest <- sample_manifest %>%
  mutate(
    has_methylation = data_category == "DNA Methylation",
    has_expression_file = str_detect(
      file_name,
      regex("rna|gene|count|star|htseq", ignore_case = TRUE)
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Build patient-level clinical master
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_core <- clinical %>%
  transmute(
    case_submitter_id = cases_submitter_id,
    case_uuid = cases_case_id,
    project_id = project_project_id,
    age_at_index = demographic_age_at_index,
    gender = demographic_gender,
    race = demographic_race,
    ethnicity = demographic_ethnicity,
    vital_status = demographic_vital_status,
    days_to_death = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(demographic_days_to_death)),
    days_to_lost_to_followup = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(cases_days_to_lost_to_followup)),
    primary_site = cases_primary_site,
    disease_type = cases_disease_type,
    prior_treatment = diagnoses_prior_treatment,
    tumor_grade = diagnoses_tumor_grade,
    primary_diagnosis = diagnoses_primary_diagnosis
  ) %>%
  group_by(case_submitter_id) %>%
  summarise(
    case_uuid = first(na.omit(case_uuid)),
    project_id = first(na.omit(project_id)),
    age_at_index = first(na.omit(age_at_index)),
    gender = first(na.omit(gender)),
    race = first(na.omit(race)),
    ethnicity = first(na.omit(ethnicity)),
    vital_status = first(na.omit(vital_status)),
    days_to_death = if (all(is.na(days_to_death))) NA_real_ else max(days_to_death, na.rm = TRUE),
    days_to_lost_to_followup = if (all(is.na(days_to_lost_to_followup))) NA_real_ else max(days_to_lost_to_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_site = first(na.omit(primary_site)),
    disease_type = first(na.omit(disease_type)),
    prior_treatment = first(na.omit(prior_treatment)),
    tumor_grade = first(na.omit(tumor_grade)),
    primary_diagnosis = first(na.omit(primary_diagnosis)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

followup_core <- followup %>%
  transmute(
    case_submitter_id = cases_submitter_id,
    days_to_follow_up = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(follow_ups_days_to_follow_up)),
    days_to_progression = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(follow_ups_days_to_progression)),
    days_to_progression_free = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(follow_ups_days_to_progression_free))
  ) %>%
  group_by(case_submitter_id) %>%
  summarise(
    days_to_follow_up = if (all(is.na(days_to_follow_up))) NA_real_ else max(days_to_follow_up, na.rm = TRUE),
    days_to_progression = if (all(is.na(days_to_progression))) NA_real_ else max(days_to_progression, na.rm = TRUE),
    days_to_progression_free = if (all(is.na(days_to_progression_free))) NA_real_ else max(days_to_progression_free, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pathology_core <- pathology %>%
  transmute(
    case_submitter_id = cases_submitter_id,
    architectural_pattern = pathology_details_morphologic_architectural_pattern,
    epithelioid_percent = pathology_details_epithelioid_cell_percent,
    necrosis_percent = pathology_details_necrosis_percent,
    sarcomatoid_percent = pathology_details_sarcomatoid_percent,
    spindle_cell_percent = pathology_details_spindle_cell_percent,
    tumor_infiltrating_lymphocytes = pathology_details_tumor_infiltrating_lymphocytes,
    tumor_infiltrating_macrophages = pathology_details_tumor_infiltrating_macrophages
  ) %>%
  distinct()

exposure_core <- exposure %>%
  transmute(
    case_submitter_id = cases_submitter_id,
    exposure_type = exposures_exposure_type,
    asbestos_exposure_type = exposures_asbestos_exposure_type,
    smoking_status = exposures_tobacco_smoking_status,
    smoking_frequency = exposures_smoking_frequency,
    pack_years_smoked = exposures_pack_years_smoked,
    cigarettes_per_day = exposures_cigarettes_per_day,
    exposure_duration_years = exposures_exposure_duration_years,
    occupation_duration_years = exposures_occupation_duration_years,
    occupation_type = exposures_occupation_type
  )

# collapse exposure to one row per case
exposure_core <- exposure_core %>%
  group_by(case_submitter_id) %>%
  summarise(
    exposure_type = paste(unique(na.omit(exposure_type)), collapse = "; "),
    asbestos_exposure_type = paste(unique(na.omit(asbestos_exposure_type)), collapse = "; "),
    smoking_status = paste(unique(na.omit(smoking_status)), collapse = "; "),
    smoking_frequency = paste(unique(na.omit(smoking_frequency)), collapse = "; "),
    occupation_type = paste(unique(na.omit(occupation_type)), collapse = "; "),
    pack_years_smoked = {
      x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(pack_years_smoked))
      if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    cigarettes_per_day = {
      x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(cigarettes_per_day))
      if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    exposure_duration_years = {
      x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(exposure_duration_years))
      if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    occupation_duration_years = {
      x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(occupation_duration_years))
      if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )

family_core <- family %>%
  transmute(
    case_submitter_id = cases_submitter_id,
    relationship_type = family_histories_relationship_type,
    relationship_primary_diagnosis = family_histories_relationship_primary_diagnosis,
    relative_with_cancer_history = family_histories_relative_with_cancer_history,
    relatives_with_cancer_history_count = family_histories_relatives_with_cancer_history_count
  ) %>%
  group_by(case_submitter_id) %>%
  summarise(
    family_cancer_history = if_else(
      any(relative_with_cancer_history == "yes", na.rm = TRUE),
      "yes",
      "no"
    ),
    family_cancer_types = paste(unique(na.omit(relationship_primary_diagnosis)), collapse = "; "),
    relatives_with_cancer_history_count = {
      x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(relatives_with_cancer_history_count))
      if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )

clinical_master <- clinical_core %>%
  left_join(followup_core, by = "case_submitter_id") %>%
  left_join(pathology_core, by = "case_submitter_id") %>%
  left_join(exposure_core, by = "case_submitter_id") %>%
  left_join(family_core, by = "case_submitter_id")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Create outcome variable
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_master <- clinical_master %>%
  mutate(
    days_to_death = as.numeric(days_to_death),
    days_to_follow_up = as.numeric(days_to_follow_up),
    survival_time_days = coalesce(days_to_death, days_to_follow_up),
    survival_500 = case_when(
      !is.na(days_to_death) & days_to_death > 500 ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(days_to_death) & days_to_death <= 500 ~ "No",
      is.na(days_to_death) & !is.na(days_to_follow_up) & days_to_follow_up > 500 ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    survival_500 = factor(survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
  )
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Clean expression matrix
#--------------------------------------------------

# remove version suffix from Ensembl IDs if wanted
expr_clean <- expr %>%
  rename(gene_id = 1) %>%
  mutate(gene_id = str_remove(gene_id, "\\..*$")) %>%
  mutate(across(-gene_id, as.numeric)) %>%
  group_by(gene_id) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop")

sum(duplicated(expr_clean$gene_id))
dim(expr_clean)

# transpose: rows become samples, columns become genes
expr_t <- expr_clean %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id") %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_submitter_id") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    case_submitter_id = str_sub(sample_submitter_id, 1, 12)
  ) %>%
  relocate(case_submitter_id, .after = sample_submitter_id) %>%
  distinct(case_submitter_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

# if there are duplicate samples per patient, keep the first for now
expr_t <- expr_t %>%
  distinct(case_submitter_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Merge clinical + expression
#--------------------------------------------------

merged_clinical_expression <- clinical_master %>%
  inner_join(expr_t, by = "case_submitter_id")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Save interim outputs
#--------------------------------------------------

write_rds(sample_manifest, here("data", "interim", "sample_manifest.rds"))
write_rds(clinical_master, here("data", "interim", "clinical_master.rds"))
write_rds(expr_t, here("data", "interim", "expression_clean.rds"))
write_rds(merged_clinical_expression, here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_expression.rds"))
```



```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. Checks
#--------------------------------------------------
dim(clinical_master)
dim(expr_t)
dim(merged_clinical_expression)

length(unique(clinical_master$case_submitter_id))
length(unique(expr_t$case_submitter_id))
length(intersect(clinical_master$case_submitter_id, expr_t$case_submitter_id))
```

```{r}
table(clinical_master$survival_500, useNA = "ifany")
summary(clinical_master$survival_time_days)
```

```{r}
head(expr_t$sample_submitter_id, 10)
head(expr_t$case_submitter_id, 10)
head(clinical_master$case_submitter_id, 10)
```

```{r}
dim(expr_clean)
sum(duplicated(expr_clean$gene_id))
names(expr_t)[1:10]
```

```{r}
names(expr_t)[1:10]
head(expr_t$sample_submitter_id, 5)
head(expr_t$case_submitter_id, 5)
length(intersect(clinical_master$case_submitter_id, expr_t$case_submitter_id))
dim(merged_clinical_expression)
table(clinical_master$survival_500, useNA = "ifany")
```

```{r}
clinical_master %>% count(case_submitter_id) %>% filter(n > 1)
expr_t %>% count(case_submitter_id) %>% filter(n > 1)
merged_clinical_expression %>% count(case_submitter_id) %>% filter(n > 1)
```

```{r}
clinical_master %>%
  filter(is.na(survival_500)) %>%
  select(case_submitter_id, vital_status, days_to_death, days_to_follow_up, survival_time_days)
```

```{r}
setdiff(clinical_master$case_submitter_id, expr_t$case_submitter_id)
setdiff(expr_t$case_submitter_id, clinical_master$case_submitter_id)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 10. Methylation Matrix
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_files <- list.files(
  here("data", "raw", "MethylationData"),
  full.names = TRUE
)

```

```{r}
meth_lookup <- sample_sheet %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(data_category, regex("methyl", ignore_case = TRUE)) |
    str_detect(data_type, regex("methyl", ignore_case = TRUE)) |
    str_detect(file_name, regex("methyl", ignore_case = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    file_id,
    file_name,
    case_submitter_id = case_id,
    sample_submitter_id = sample_id
  ) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r}
read_meth_file <- function(path, meth_lookup) {
  file_base <- basename(path)
  file_id_from_path <- str_extract(file_base, "^[^.]+")
  
  matched_row <- meth_lookup %>%
    filter(file_id == file_id_from_path)
  
  if (nrow(matched_row) == 0) {
    warning("No sample-sheet match found for file_id: ", file_id_from_path)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  sample_id <- matched_row$sample_submitter_id[1]
  
  df <- read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    rename(
      probe_id = 1,
      !!sample_id := 2
    ) %>%
    mutate(!!sample_id := as.numeric(.data[[sample_id]]))
  
  df
}
```

```{r}
meth_list <- lapply(meth_files, read_meth_file, meth_lookup = meth_lookup)

meth_list <- meth_list[!sapply(meth_list, is.null)]

meth_wide <- reduce(meth_list, full_join, by = "probe_id")
```

```{r}
dim(meth_wide)
names(meth_wide)[1:10]
head(meth_wide[, 1:5])
```

```{r}
sum(duplicated(meth_wide$probe_id))
```

```{r}
meth_clean <- meth_wide
```

```{r}
meth_t <- meth_clean %>%
  column_to_rownames("probe_id") %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_submitter_id") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    case_submitter_id = str_sub(sample_submitter_id, 1, 12)
  ) %>%
  relocate(case_submitter_id, .after = sample_submitter_id) %>%
  distinct(case_submitter_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
merged_clinical_methylation <- clinical_master %>%
  inner_join(meth_t, by = "case_submitter_id")
```

```{r}
common_cases <- Reduce(
  intersect,
  list(
    clinical_master$case_submitter_id,
    expr_t$case_submitter_id,
    meth_t$case_submitter_id
  )
)

merged_clinical_multiomic <- clinical_master %>%
  filter(case_submitter_id %in% common_cases) %>%
  inner_join(expr_t, by = "case_submitter_id") %>%
  inner_join(meth_t, by = c("case_submitter_id", "sample_submitter_id"), suffix = c("_expr", "_meth"))
```

```{r}
write_rds(meth_wide, here("data", "interim", "methylation_matrix_wide.rds"))
write_rds(meth_t, here("data", "interim", "methylation_clean.rds"))
write_rds(merged_clinical_methylation, here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_methylation.rds"))
write_rds(merged_clinical_multiomic, here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_multiomic.rds"))
```

```{r}
# Checks
head(meth_files, 3)
head(meth_lookup, 3)
basename(meth_files[1])
```

```{r}
unique(sample_sheet$data_category)

sample_sheet %>%
  count(data_category, data_type, sort = TRUE)
```

```{r}
head(meth_lookup, 5)
nrow(meth_lookup)
```

```{r}
nrow(meth_lookup)
length(meth_files)
length(meth_list)
dim(meth_wide)
dim(meth_t)
dim(merged_clinical_methylation)

head(meth_t$sample_submitter_id, 5)
head(meth_t$case_submitter_id, 5)

length(intersect(clinical_master$case_submitter_id, meth_t$case_submitter_id))
```

```{r}
length(intersect(expr_t$case_submitter_id, meth_t$case_submitter_id))

setdiff(meth_t$case_submitter_id, expr_t$case_submitter_id)
setdiff(expr_t$case_submitter_id, meth_t$case_submitter_id)
```
